titleStmt.title: SII 9.464: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 464. (A.R. No. 427 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF A HOUSE TO THE SOUTH OF THE TANK, DODDAKEREKATTE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1395, Nandana, Bhādrapada, ba. 8, Bu[dhavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1472 August 26, Wednesday, in the reign of Virūpāksha-Mahārāya ruling from Vijayanagara. It records that, while Viṭṭharasa was ruling over Bārākura- rājya, Duggaṇa-Seṭṭi of Paḍuvakēri at Basurūr and his three nephews made a grant of land to Siriyappa on the latter's return from his pilgrimage to Benares, for the worship of the image of the god Kāśī-Viśvanātha which he had brought with him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrīgurubhyō(ṁ)nnamaḥ . śrīsarasvattyai namaḥ . nirvvighnamastu namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavarṣa 1394 saṁdu A
yidaneya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada bhādrapada ba 8 bu lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa virupā
kṣamahārāyarū vijayanagarada siṁhāsanadaliddu sakalasāṁbrājyavanū Āḷuttiha kāladalli Avara nirū
padiṁda viṭhṭharasavoḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanu pratipālisutaṁviha kāladalli . basuṟūra paḍuvakēriya sāva
ṁṇasēnabōvara maga baḷḷābaḷiya duggaṇaseṭṭiyaru Avara Aḷiyaṁdiru Akkaseṭṭitiya maga sōvaṇaseṭṭi bāli
yakkaseṭṭittiya maga nāgaṇaseṭṭi sāvakkaseṭṭitiya maga dēuseṭṭi Iṁtī mūvaru tāya makkaḷu Ā duggaṇaseṭṭiyu
Iṁtī nālvarū voḍaṁbaṭṭu javarupāliya tirumalenāthaseṭṭara makkaḷu siriyappagaḷu vāraṇāsige hōgi Ā
vāraṇāsiyiṁda viśvanāthadēvaranu paṁcapūje sahitavāgi vijayaṁgeyisikoṁḍu baralāgi Ā vāraṇāsi siriyappagaḷi
ge sūryyōparāgapuṇyakāladalli Ā duggaṇaseṭṭiyarū Avara Aḷiyaṁdirū dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyanū E
ṟadukoṭṭa dharmmada bāḷina vivara . guḍḍaṁpāḍiya kaṟikeya kaḷiyalli nālvaṁḍeyali muvattanālku muḍi Akki gēṇi yikkuva bā
ḷu Ā bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu daṇṇira sāliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalū daṇṇira sāliṁdaṁ baḍagalu . paḍu
valu Uppunīra hoḷeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kaṟikeya A(ṁ)ṇṇahebāruvana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ dharmmada bāḷi
ṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa sarvvabāḷu mara phala Anubhakkaṁ mūvattanālku muḍi
nālku muḍi Akki teṟanū kaḷeci śuddha mūvattu muḍi Akki mattaṁ hatāvarada Oḷage Adhivāsada mūvattu muḍi
bhatta gēṇi bittuva bāḷu Ā bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu Eḷaṟeya sāvaṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁka
lu toḷahara baḷiya māṇikkaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu . paḍuvalu mudda haḷiya nāyakana gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ mūḍalu . baḍagalu kāḍiṁdaṁ teṁkalu . Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa sarvvabāḷu mane ṭhāu mara
phala Anubha . mattaṁ kaṁdāvarada Oḷage halakāveyalli duggaṇaseṭṭiyara mūlada bāḷu hiriyagadde 1 kka
ṁ nālkuvare muḍi mattaṁ kruṣṇaupādhyara kayyali koṁḍadu ṇikaneṁba gadde 1 kkam Oṁduvare muḍi mattaṁ Ā beṭṭina O
ḷage Akki saha hanneraḍu muḍi tāṟuvāriya bageya beṭṭina Oḷage Āṟu muḍi A(ṁ)ntū Ippattanālku muḍi gade
ṇiya bhatta nālvaṁḍeyalū muḍi Ayivattu mattaṁ rāmana koḍalu saha . A(ṁ)ntu �yo mūṟu bageya bāḷige gēṇiya Akki
muḍi 70 Eppattu muḍi Akki gēṇi yikuva bāḷanū Ā siriyappagaḷē teṟu dēvasvavanū tettu va pūjeyanū māḍi
koṁḍu dīvaḷigeyahabbada mūṟudinada raṁgapūjeyanū naḍasikoṁḍu bāḷuvaru mattaṁ Ā viśvanāthadēvara naṁdādīptige Ā
duggaṇaseṭiya hittila catussīmeya vivara . mū . rājabīdiyiṁdaṁ pa . taṁ . badāḍeya sōvaṇaseṭṭiya parada ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ ba . pa . mahādēvara keṟeya tūbina nīru hariva kōḍiṁdaṁ . mū . ba . mahādēvara keṟeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ . teṁ .
Iṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷḷa mane tōṭavanu Anubhavisi naṁdādīptiyanū naḍasikoṁḍu bāḷuvaru . mattaṁ Ā du
gaṇaseṭiyaru kaṭṭista maṭha mane A maneya saritake banda hittilu Ivanū Iṣṭaṟa Oḷaguḷa mara phala Anubha nidhi nikṣē
pa jala pāṣāṇa Aṣṭabhōga tēja svāmyavanū Ā siriyappagaḷige Avara saṁtānasantānaparaṁpareyāgi Ācaṁdrārka
sthāyigaḷāgi sukhadalli bāḷuvaṁtāgi Ā duggaṇaseṭṭiyarū Avara Aḷiyaṁdirū Iṁtī nālvarū Oppi Oḍaṁbaṭṭu
Ā siriyappagaḷige dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyanū Eṟadu koṭṭu Ā dugaṇaseṭṭiyarū Avara Āḷiyaṁdirū bara
si koṭṭa dharmaśilāśāsana . Ī dharmake muṟuva māṟusalladu muttuva batte salladu Ī dharmada Asādhyavanu ha
ttukke siriyappagaḷu Ā duggaṇaseṭṭiyarigū Avara Aḷiyaṁdirigū hēḷuvaru Ā siriyappagaḷū Ā duggaṇa
seṭṭiyarū Avara Aḷiyaṁdirū paḍuvakēryya halaru seṭṭikāṟarige hēḷuvaru hēḷalāgi Ā paḍuvakēryya
halaru seṭṭikāṟa pārupattyavanū vicārisikoṭṭa Ā dharmavanū pratipālisi koḍuvaru .
dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāḥ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . . maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī śrī śrī ... viṣṇurāvāḷiya maga paḍuvakēriya halaru seṭṭikāṟara sēnabō
va saṁkarasēnabōvara baraha śrī . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.464 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
